title: odontarrhena tortuosa subsp. tortuosa
intro: Odontarrhena tortuosa subsp. tortuosa, also known as Mountain Heliotrope, is a type of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Mountain Heliotrope include reducing fever and inflammation, as well as treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. Mountain Heliotrope can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
